scripts.build:wheels: cd ../../../cadbuildr/foundation && uv build --out-dir dist && cd ../../cadbuildr_projects/woodworking && uv build --out-dir dist
scripts.sync-wheels: pnpm run build:wheels && mkdir -p public/local-wheels && cp ../../../cadbuildr/foundation/dist/cadbuildr_foundation-*.whl public/local-wheels/ && cp ../dist/cadbuildr_projects_woodworking-*.whl public/local-wheels/
